principles: Markdown remains the source of truth.
Global installation requires uninstall or rollback verification.

safety_gates.description: Do not push repository changes without a direct human approval for that push.
Do not publish any package without a direct human approval for that publish action.
Do not distribute a public package before a repository license is selected.
Do not distribute a public package before stronger JSON Schema validation is in place.
Keep hook setup project-local unless a future global installer has rollback verification and explicit approval.
Any installer must have a verified uninstall or rollback path before use.
Installer work remains preview-only until rollback or uninstall behavior is verified in a scratch target.

channels.label: Clone-local repository usage
channels.description: Use VibeLog from a local clone through npm scripts and direct Node entrypoints.

channels.label: GitHub release bundle
channels.description: Package a tagged repository archive for download after remote clone and archive verification.

channels.label: Local installer scripts
channels.description: Dry-run-only installer planner that previews local VibeLog skill files, scripts, docs, and rollback steps without writing files.

channels.label: npm package
channels.description: Future package-manager distribution after the data contract, license, package metadata, and publish dry-run are ready.

channels.label: Agent-specific templates
channels.description: Future helper packs for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, AGENTS.md, and other agent environments.

next_recommended_slices.reason: A verified rollback path is required before any installer write mode can exist.
Remote clone or release-bundle verification is needed before public distribution.
